logo_description: StrideWear logo: a bold 'SW' monogram where the S and W letterforms are fused at the midpoint, with both letters italicized at approximately 12 degrees forward lean. The right leg of the W extends into a sharp chevron arrow pointing right, symbolizing forward momentum. Rendered in solid black on white or white on black with no gradients or outlines. On footwear the logo appears on the heel tab, shoe tongue, and outer sidewall. On apparel it sits on the left chest, center back neck tape, and sleeve cuff. On shorts and leggings a smaller version appears at the left hip. Hang-tags feature the full 'StrideWear' wordmark in bold condensed sans-serif below the monogram on a white card stock tag.
required_contexts: athletic performance or competitive sports scenes
prohibited_contexts: competitor athletic brand apparel visible in the same frame
